title: Support for Elaboration System Tasks
body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/discussions/1027
Originally posted by **abradd** November 13, 2023 I wasn't sure if this was better posted as a discussion or issue. Are elaboration system tasks supported in master or v12? According to [this comment](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/issues/546#issuecomment-929506692), there was initial support for Elaboration System Tasks on the development branch as of late 2021. Is the development branch `master`? I'm not sure if this change would have appeared in the v12 release, but my initial testing suggests they are ignored. As a further test, I compiled 28987277adf8bd99da5b777aa7b3275d4a1fa016 and it seems like the elaboration system task is being ignored. I took the following example from the 1800-2017 Standard (Sec 20.11) and modified it to attempt to force the task to be picked up, but as far as I can tell it is being ignored. ``` verilog module test #(N = 1) (input [N-1:0] in, output [N-1:0] out); if (1) begin $fatal(0, "This should be a problem."); end assign out = in; endmodule ```
